title: Modern UI
description: Modern UI redesigns the interface with modern colors and a clean, minimalist look.
body:
**Modern UI** is a resource pack designed to give Minecraft’s UI a cleaner and more modern look. It focuses entirely on menus, inventories, and the HUD, without touching blocks or items. The goal is to keep the game original while presenting it as a step toward the future, with a smoother design.

The pack takes inspiration from modern system design, using simple and consistent colors. Layouts stay close to vanilla, but feel more refreshing and user-friendly. Rather than replacing Minecraft’s identity, Modern UI refreshes it in an organic, forward-moving way.

## ✨ Summary
- Fresh and future-oriented redesign of menus, HUD, and containers
- Minimalist visuals that preserve the vanilla style
- Consistent layouts and a clean color palette
- The attack indicator was changed to two crossing swords, to make the fighting with hit delay way easier.
- Fully compatible with other texture packs
